settings.title: Monster Piercing BCR's
settings.text:
Captive Bead Rings, also known as Ball Closure Rings (BCRs) are a fundamental piece of jewellery in the world of body modification. Known for their circular design with a captive ball, BCRs are widely used in multiple piercings, from ears and nostrils to lips, nipples, and even eyebrows. At Monster Piercing, we prioritize both style and functionality by offering BCR rings in a wide range of materials, including surgical steel, titanium, and gold. These materials are not only durable but also hypoallergenic, making them suitable for initial piercings and long-term wear. 

One of the main features of a BCR is its secure closure, where the ball is held in place by the tension of the ring, ensuring that it doesn’t easily fall out. Available in various sizes and gauges, BCR rings are easy to remove and replace, offering convenience for those who like to change their jewelry frequently. Their simple design also allows for a clean, minimalistic look, but with the option to choose decorative balls to add a touch of personal style. BCRs are versatile, making them ideal for both casual and formal wear, allowing for flexibility in how you express your individuality.
